sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Mual Siangtho tungah A Teng Mite

verses.text: Topa aw, na biakinn sungah kua om ding ahi hiam? Na mual siangtho tungah kua teng ding ahi hiam
Paubaang loin gamta-in, a manin na sem a, lungsim tak a gen mi
mi gensia loin, a lawmte tungah siatna bawllo a, a vengte a mawhsaklo mi
migilote thusimlo a, ahi zongin Topa a zahtakte a pahtawi mi, ama natna ding nangawnah a ciampello mi
ama sum a meetin a khalo, thutang mite a langpan'lo, golhguk a lalo mite teng ding uh hi. Hih bangin a gamtate pen ling ngeilo ding hi.
